realms.tagline: Crusaders, elves, and dwarves under one winter banner.
Empires of sand, secrets, and the Fallen.
The Builders, the Shrouded, and the peace they guard.

classTypes.blurb: Shield and steel. You are the wall.
The party lives because you say so.
Songs, wards, and cunning turn battles.

_notes: Race list per realm comes from factions data; race choice filters which true classes are reachable at level 10 (race x class matrix). Class TYPE is the only combat choice at creation — true class is earned at 10 via class quest (see quests.json).
